phase-0.title: Phase 0: Python Core & Fundamentals
phase-0.objective: Establish a rock-solid algorithmic and object-oriented foundation in Python. Write code manually without AI assistance.
phase-0.aiStage: Stage 1 — Zero AI (All code written physically by hand)
milestones: Write modular, clean, and typed Python code
Solve base algorithm structures from memory
Pass Phase 0 exit gate under 45 minutes
exitCriteria: Can you implement a multi-class system from memory in under 45 minutes?
Can you explain the difference between sync and async event loops?
Do you have 70+ practice scripts committed to GitHub?

dayMissions.title: Variables, Types & Flow Control
dayMissions.mission: Anchor Python variables, data types, standard input/output, and conditionals.
dayMissions.miniBuild: CLI Calculator with robust inputs validation and loop-until-quit logic.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Implement calculator without lookup in <15 minutes.

dayMissions.title: Data Structures & Iterators
dayMissions.mission: Master lists, dictionaries, tuples, sets, and comprehension iterations.
dayMissions.miniBuild: CLI Student Gradebook managing dynamic lists of student records and grade stats.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Write grade aggregation math from memory.

week-1.title: Week 1: Python Syntax & Controls
week-1.objective: Rebuild core coding speed and syntax fluency without automatic code completions.
exitCriteria: Implement variables, logical branches, and loops from memory
Verify clean docstring styling on all functions

dayMissions.title: Functions & Scopes
dayMissions.mission: Define modular functions, explore global/local variable scopes, and use default parameters.
dayMissions.miniBuild: CLI Library catalog search tool matching titles, categories, and availability.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Write recursive functions under 10 minutes.

week-2.title: Week 2: OOP & Asynchronous Python
week-2.objective: Advance to object-oriented architecture and asynchronous concurrency primitives.
exitCriteria: Write multi-class inventory simulator in <40 mins
Benchmark async scraper vs sync scraper

dayMissions.title: Object Oriented Programming
dayMissions.mission: Model real-world entities using classes, inheritance, dunder methods, and encapsulations.
dayMissions.miniBuild: OOP RPG Battle simulator where custom hero classes duel enemy monsters.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Verify encapsulation properties from memory.

dayMissions.title: Asynchronous Concurrency
dayMissions.mission: Understand cooperative multitasking, event loops, async/await, and asyncio.gather().
dayMissions.miniBuild: Async API data simulator fetching from 3 endpoints concurrently.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Explain the difference between threading and async loops.

timedAssessment.title: Phase 0 Exit Gate Assessment
timedAssessment.prompt: Write a complete CLI Inventory and Order management system in Python from scratch, including classes, stock reduction thread-simulation, and input loop. Do not use AI or external help.

phase-1.title: Phase 1: SQL Strengthening & Database Schema Design
phase-1.objective: Transition to relational databases. Write raw SQL queries and design robust schemas.
phase-1.aiStage: Stage 1 — Zero AI (Write all queries in DB console manually)
exitCriteria: Can you write a 3-table analytical join in under 15 minutes?
Can you optimize a slow sequential scan using a custom index?

week-3.title: Week 3: Database Schemas & Joins
week-3.objective: Establish table structures, constraints, primary/foreign keys, and data normalization.
exitCriteria: Define tables with appropriate constraints
Explain 1NF, 2NF, 3NF difference

dayMissions.title: Relational Database Schema Design
dayMissions.mission: Create tables, define foreign keys, and map relational constraints (one-to-many, many-to-many).
dayMissions.miniBuild: Normalized database script mapping an e-commerce platform schema.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Create junction tables from memory.

week-4.title: Week 4: Window Functions & Transactions
week-4.objective: Master advanced query analytics and database transactional safety.
exitCriteria: Write monthly total revenue LAG calculation
Analyze index impact via EXPLAIN ANALYZE

dayMissions.title: Advanced Analytical Queries
dayMissions.mission: Learn analytical Window functions: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LEAD, and LAG.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Database analytics script auditing student test score distributions.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Explain partition sorting vs standard group by.

timedAssessment.title: Phase 1 Exit Gate Assessment
timedAssessment.prompt: Write a single SQL query performing a 3-table join calculating running total revenue grouped by country and ranked by product category, returning only rank < 3.

phase-2.title: Phase 2: Frontend Layouts & Logic
phase-2.objective: Build semantic, responsive interfaces and execute DOM interactions using Vanilla CSS and JavaScript.
phase-2.aiStage: Stage 1 — Zero AI (Manual CSS grid layouts, zero UI component libraries)
milestones: Design fully responsive layout systems without CSS frameworks
Handle async fetch requests and render UI dynamically
Maintain sub-pixel alignment across grid grids
exitCriteria: Can you implement a responsive landing page layout in under 1 hour?
Can you fetch data from a public API and display it in a grid without templates?

week-5.title: Week 5: Semantic Layouts & CSS Grids
week-5.objective: Implement grid grid systems, custom styling variables, and device-responsive typography.
exitCriteria: Write responsive media query queries from memory
Implement flexbox flex alignments

dayMissions.title: Semantic HTML & Layout Foundations
dayMissions.mission: Construct semantic web structures using <header>, <nav>, <section>, <article>, and <footer> tags.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Responsive Developer Portfolio Landing Page without styling frameworks.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Ensure 100% semantic validation.

week-6.title: Week 6: JavaScript DOM & Async Integration
week-6.objective: Write Vanilla JS algorithms to manipulate DOM nodes and fetch network resources.
exitCriteria: Handle API errors gracefully during network fetch
Write event delegation handler

dayMissions.title: Asynchronous Network Requests
dayMissions.mission: Connect to external API endpoints using async/await, fetching and formatting JSON arrays.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Search dashboard showing open git issues from public repositories.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Correctly implement Promise.all() concurrency.

timedAssessment.title: Phase 2 Exit Gate Assessment
timedAssessment.prompt: Build a responsive search dashboard that fetches data from a public JSON endpoint, lists elements in a grid, and supports search filtering. Standard Vanilla JS and CSS only.

phase-3.title: Phase 3: React Core & State Management
phase-3.objective: Transition to reactive components. Master props, states, hooks, and TypeScript types.
phase-3.aiStage: Stage 2 — AI structural reading only (concept hints allowed)
milestones: Compose typed props and state interfaces
exitCriteria: Can you implement custom React hooks for fetch/storage in under 30 mins?
Can you type components, events, and context providers without any errors?

week-7.title: Week 7: Components & State Hooks
week-7.objective: Build modular, reusable React elements and handle state hooks.
exitCriteria: Lift state from three sibling components
Handle forms validation in state

dayMissions.title: Lifting State Up
dayMissions.mission: Manage parent-child data flows, passing functions as props to update parent states.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Interactive task planner organizing tasks into stages.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Handle updates to arrays in state safely.

week-8.title: Week 8: Side Effects & TypeScript Integration
week-8.objective: Synchronize external state using useEffect and type check all data.
exitCriteria: Write type-safe API result container
Prevent infinite re-renders in useEffect

dayMissions.title: Effect Hook Dependency Control
dayMissions.mission: Configure dependency arrays, execute cleanup tasks, and track refs with useRef.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Stock index tracker dashboard displaying mock stock adjustments.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Create custom useLocalStorage hook.

phase-4.title: Phase 4: React + TS Complex Development
phase-4.objective: Develop production-grade full-stack single-page interfaces with routing and global state.
phase-4.aiStage: Stage 2 — AI structural reading only (No direct code generation)
milestones: Build global state container via Context API
Complete Expense Tracker Pro portfolio capstone
exitCriteria: Can you configure React Router nested routing layouts from memory?
Is Expense Tracker Pro fully responsive and functional?

week-9.title: Week 9: React Router & Context API
week-9.objective: Configure nested routing grids and manage global states without prop drilling.
exitCriteria: Provide user state via Context to 5 deep children
Enforce private route guards

dayMissions.title: Global State Context Providers
dayMissions.mission: Wrap your application layout in Context Providers, supplying auth details across routes.
dayMissions.miniBuild: User dashboard layout featuring responsive nested view panels.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Optimize context renders using custom hook selectors.

week-10.title: Week 10: Capstone (Expense Tracker Pro)
week-10.objective: Consolidate React, TypeScript, and state storage into a portfolio-grade capstone.
exitCriteria: Implement transaction history sorting & filtering
Complete local data exports to CSV

dayMissions.title: Expense Tracker Pro Capstone
dayMissions.mission: Create a full dashboard visualizing transactions, income, categories, and monthly analytics.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Expense Tracker Pro complete build with clean layout transitions.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Must compile with zero TypeScript compiler errors.

timedAssessment.title: Phase 4 Exit Gate Assessment
timedAssessment.prompt: Implement a complete task board (Kanban) with columns, custom drag-and-drop mechanics (or click to move), local storage history logs, and priority filter, fully typed in TypeScript under 3 hours.

phase-5.title: Phase 5: FastAPI Backend Services
phase-5.objective: Build asynchronous, production-ready REST APIs. Model schemas, migrate databases, and secure routes.
phase-5.aiStage: Stage 3 — Review & Optimize (Write backend logic yourself, use AI for post-build refactoring)
milestones: Write asynchronous API routers and lifespan context managers
Manage SQL schema changes via Alembic migrations
Implement JWT token authentication and role validation rules
exitCriteria: Can you implement a complete JWT login authentication endpoint in <45 mins?
Can you execute Alembic migrations without locking the database?

week-11.title: Week 11: Async Routers & Pydantic
week-11.objective: Define type-safe Pydantic request models and implement router endpoints.
exitCriteria: Validate complex nested lists using Pydantic Field()
Set custom error response schemas

dayMissions.title: FastAPI Asynchronous Lifespans
dayMissions.mission: Initialize app configurations, manage database engines startup, and handle route definitions.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Task tracker REST API exposing standard CRUD operations.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Verify OpenAPI Swagger docs render all custom fields.

week-12.title: Week 12: SQLAlchemy ORM & Alembic
week-12.objective: Manage relational data mappings and database schema migrations asynchronously.
exitCriteria: Mitigate database N+1 problems via joinedload()
Run database rollback on session transactions failure

dayMissions.title: Asynchronous ORM Sessions
dayMissions.mission: Configure async database engines, session context manager scopes, and relationships.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Order management API with dynamic price calculation database triggers.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Confirm migrations run cleanly without exceptions.

phase-6.title: Phase 6: Full-Stack & AI Agent Integration
phase-6.objective: Merge React, FastAPI, and Databases. Integrate LLM prompts and vector search capabilities.
phase-6.aiStage: Stage 4 — Pair programming (Collaborative design with AI mentor)
milestones: Connect React client securely to FastAPI backend
Embed vector databases for RAG question answering
Build multi-step AI agents using LangGraph
exitCriteria: Can you ingest a text document, vector search the chunks, and generate an answer in under 1 hour?
Can you containerize the entire application in a docker-compose environment?

week-13.title: Week 13: Full-Stack Integration
week-13.objective: Build unified full-stack layouts with cross-origin security configurations.
milestones: Fetch data in React from local backend
exitCriteria: Synchronize client auth tokens across tabs
Handle connection lost events gracefully

dayMissions.title: CORS & Client Fetch Operations
dayMissions.mission: Deploy CORS middleware, parse requests headers, and bind state setters to fetched API payloads.
dayMissions.miniBuild: EJP V0.1 complete layout connecting the React frontend visual visualizer to SQLite db endpoints.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Verify zero CORS blockages across fetch requests.

week-14.title: Week 14: LLM APIs & Vector Search (RAG)
week-14.objective: Generate text embedding vectors and build Retrieval-Augmented Generation loops.
exitCriteria: Ingest and chunk text files
Build cosine similarity database query

dayMissions.title: Structured LLM Outputs
dayMissions.mission: Invoke LLM APIs, pass system prompts, configure temperature parameters, and enforce JSON formats.
dayMissions.miniBuild: AI Study Assistant summarizing text files and answering questions from local vector databases.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Show structured JSON output from LLM API query.

week-15.title: Week 15: Agentic AI & LangGraph Workflows
week-15.objective: Design stateful agent nodes, routing paths, and database state updates.
exitCriteria: Run multi-turn conversation with memory
Inject tool call execution outputs into prompt context

dayMissions.title: LangGraph Nodes & Router Logic
dayMissions.mission: Declare graph states, node routers, conditional edge loops, and tool execution frameworks.
dayMissions.miniBuild: AI Task agent updating the database when user requests task updates in natural language.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Demonstrate functional tool routing in local terminals.

phase-7.title: Phase 7: System Design & Placement Season
phase-7.objective: Exhaustively study large-scale architecture design and solve complex DSA under pressure.
phase-7.aiStage: Stage 5 — AI Acceleration (AI used for speed and boilerplate, concept is fully understood)
milestones: Complete full system designs in under 45 minutes
Perform scale, bandwidth, and database queries calculations
Solve medium-hard LeetCode problems in 20 minutes under timed conditions
exitCriteria: Can you sketch a complete video transcoding system architecture (YouTube)?
Can you explain the celeb write-amplification problem in timeline feeds?

week-16.title: Week 16: Horizontal Scaling & Caching
week-16.objective: Examine consistent hashing, CDN origin pulls, and cache invalidation strategies.
exitCriteria: Write scale calculation estimations for 10M DAU write loads
Diagram load balancer configurations

dayMissions.title: System Design: Scaling Timeline Feeds
dayMissions.mission: Evaluate write-heavy feed architectures, push vs pull strategies, and Redis layout storage.
dayMissions.miniBuild: High-level architectural blueprint for a distributed social feed platform.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Identify single points of failure in the design.

week-17.title: Week 17: Competitive DSA Sprint
week-17.objective: Examine advanced dynamic programming, topological sorting, and heap intervals.
exitCriteria: Implement course scheduler Topological Sort in <20 minutes
Explain coin change recursive tree pruning parameters

dayMissions.title: Dynamic Programming: Knapsack Variations
dayMissions.mission: Examine base state equations, memoization recursion, and bottom-up iterations.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Complexity benchmarking report comparing dynamic memory algorithms vs brute force searches.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Solve Coin Change with O(N*M) space complexity.

week-18.title: Week 18: Mock Interviews & Funnels
week-18.objective: Refine technical communication under pressure. Build application funnels.
exitCriteria: Pitch project in 5 minutes using the STAR framework
Achieve 10+ target applications per week target

dayMissions.title: Behavioral STAR Framework Drills
dayMissions.mission: Examine situational interview questions, draft accomplishment logs, and optimize resumes.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Personal application tracking funnel database logs.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Pass peer portfolio audit checklists.

phase-8.title: Phase 8: Career Engineering & Compounding
phase-8.objective: Excel in your first professional role. Onboard, contribute, review code, and design career trajectory.
milestones: Map data flows in production codebases within 1 week of onboarding
Establish continuous learning models (foundations, principles, tools)
exitCriteria: Write a 1-page technical design document for a feature option
Examine onboarding checkpoints logs for first 90 days

week-19.title: Week 19: Onboarding & Production Engineering
week-19.objective: Excel in the first 90 days. Onboard, understand build systems, and execute first tickets.
milestones: Execute first PR in new repository
exitCriteria: Draw production deployment pipeline flow
Complete local database configuration setup

dayMissions.title: First 90 Days Execution Blueprint
dayMissions.mission: Examine repository architectures, parse pull request guidelines, and set up manager 1:1 agendas.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Personal Onboarding checklist logs for the first 30 days.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Map critical service dependencies without guidebooks.

week-20.title: Week 20: Technical Writing & Collaboration
week-20.objective: Write technical documentation, participate in code reviews, and plan long-term career growth.
exitCriteria: Author a complete project README under 2 hours
Explain incident resolution timeline

dayMissions.title: Production Incident Post-Mortem
dayMissions.mission: Examine production failures, analyze logs timelines, identify root causes, and write mitigation actions.
dayMissions.miniBuild: Production Outage Post-Mortem report documenting response efforts.
dayMissions.exitCriteria: Ensure zero recurrence of the identified root cause.
